scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n user,product,cart,payment,frontend -c green,blue,magenta,cyan,yellow "npm --prefix User run dev" "npm --prefix Product run dev" "npm --prefix Cart run dev" "npm --prefix Payment run dev" "npm --prefix front-end run dev"
scripts.dev:v2: concurrently -n identity,catalog,checkout,frontend -c green,blue,magenta,yellow "npm --prefix User run dev" "npm --prefix Product run dev" "npm --prefix Checkout run dev" "npm --prefix front-end run dev"
scripts.dev:checkout: concurrently -n product,checkout,frontend -c blue,magenta,yellow "npm --prefix Product run dev" "npm --prefix Checkout run dev" "npm --prefix front-end run dev"
